content:
💡 facex | C
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling real-time, on-device face analysis and recognition directly in web applications without server infrastructure.
✨ Key Features: • Runs entirely in the browser via WebAssembly • Includes face detection, 576-point 3D mesh, recognition, and anti-spoofing • Zero server-side dependencies • Trained from scratch with custom models • Encrypted weights (AES-256-GCM) for browser security
📖 Summary: FaceX is a comprehensive face processing pipeline that runs entirely within the browser using WebAssembly. It offers face detection, 576-point 3D mesh generation, recognition, and anti-spoofing capabilities without requiring any server-side processing or dependencies.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
